\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4924 introduces Energy Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{E}(\rho) = \sum_{mn} \chi_{mn} \hat{E}_m \rho \hat{E}_n^{\dagger} \end{equation}
